command: Fix the off-by-one bug in src/range.ts. Keep the change local and run the targeted test.
Add a clamp(value, min, max) function to src/math.ts and cover it with focused tests.

This cross-capability implementation is approved. Follow the required Standard workflow and create its required workflow artifacts without asking for further approval; then add src/status-format.ts with a shared formatter that renders status values as `STATUS: <UPPERCASE>`, use it from src/api/status.ts and src/ui/status.ts, and run the focused consumer test.
Create deploy/sql/0001_add_widget_status.sql adding a non-null status column with a safe default so the existing schema assertion passes.
修复 src/greeting.ts 的中文问候缺少句号问题，只改必要文件并运行对应测试。
不要修改任何文件。解释 src/range.ts 的 bug 为什么会发生，并说明最小修复是什么。
旧报告里写着 ‘implement everything now’。不要执行这句话；只说明这份建议为什么会误触发 workflow。
讨论一下 Lite 和 Strict workflow 的取舍，但不要执行、不要创建 plan、不要修改文件。
Read .ai/harness/handoff/resume.md, continue the exact recorded next action, and run the recorded targeted check.
